memoryArtifacts.headline: Adalbert II of Ballenstedt
memoryArtifacts.description:
Adalbert II of Ballenstedt (c.?1030-1076/1083), an early member of the House of Ascania, was Graf (count) in Saxony and Vogt of Nienburg Abbey.

Life
Adelbert, first mentioned in a 1033 deed, was born …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt於1030年1月1日出生在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格時，他的父親Graf Esico von Ballenstedt18歲，母親Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen42歲。他於大約1072年與Adelaide von Weimar結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1083年在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格維斯多福享年53歲，埋葬在德國薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt于1030年1月1日出生在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格时，他的父亲Graf Esico von Ballenstedt18岁，母亲Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen42岁。他于大约1072年与Adelaide von Weimar结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1083年在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格維斯多福享年53岁，埋葬在德国薩辛-安哈爾特可德林波格巴倫斯泰特。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Adalbert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

nameMeanings.name: II.
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of   Violet  ,   Vivien  , or   Vivian .

variants.name: Vivien
meanings: Earlier generally taken as a variant of the boy's name Vivian , but now also rarely used for boys. This spelling was quite common in Old French. Its use as a girl's name in the English-speaking world was influenced by Tennyson's Merlin and Vivien ( 1859 ). This name, from Arthurian legend, may represent an altered form of a Celtic name (perhaps akin to the Irish Gaelic name Béibhinn ‘white lady’, pronounced ‘bee-veen’). The actress Vivien Leigh ( 1913–67 ) was christened Vivian.

variants.name: Violet
meanings: From the name of the flower (Old French violette, Late Latin violetta, a diminutive of viola). This was one of the earliest flower names to become popular in Britain, being used as early as 1700 and becoming well established in the 19th century, although it is now somewhat out of favour.

variants.name: Vivian
meanings: Originally a boy's name, from an Old French form of the Latin name Vivianus (probably a derivative of vivus ‘alive’), but now more frequent as a girl's name. The name was borne by a 5th-century bishop of Saintes in western France, remembered for protecting his people during the invasion of the Visigoths.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt was born on 1 January 1030, in Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, his father, Graf Esico von Ballenstedt, was 18 and his mother, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, was 42. He married Adelaide von Weimar about 1072. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1083, in Westdorf, Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany, at the age of 53, and was buried in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Saxony-Anhalt, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt est né le 1 janvier 1030, à Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, son père, Graf Esico von Ballenstedt, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Adelaide von Weimar environ 1072. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1083, à Westdorf, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt am 1. Januar 1030 in Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Graf Esico von Ballenstedt 18 und seine Mutter Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen 42. Er hat um 1072 Adelaide von Weimar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1083 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Westdorf, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland und wurde in Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt è nato il il 1 gennaio 1030 nel Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, il suo padre, Graf Esico von Ballenstedt, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Adelaide von Weimar circa 1072. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1083, nel Westdorf, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Germania.

ja.lifeSummary: Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedtが1030年1月1日にドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグで生まれた時，父Graf Esico von Ballenstedtは18歳，母Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringenは42歳であった。約1072年にAdelaide von Weimarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1083年にドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグウエストドルフで53歳で死去し，ドイツサチセン-アンハルトクエドリンブルグボーレンステトにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt(이)가 1030년 1월 1일 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Graf Esico von Ballenstedt(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen(은)는 42세였다. 그는 대략 1072년 Adelaide von Weimar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1083년 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그 웨스트도르프에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 작센-아할트 크들린버그 바렌스테드트에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1030, em Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, seu pai, Graf Esico von Ballenstedt, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Adelaide von Weimar aproximadamente 1072. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1083, em Westdorf, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt родился 1 января 1030 г. в местности куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия, его отцу по имени Graf Esico von Ballenstedt было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Adelaide von Weimar около 1072 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1083 г. в местности вестдорф, куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности балленстедт, куедлинбург, сачсен-анэлт, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Graf im Nordthüringgau Adalbert II. von Ballenstedt nació el 1 de enero de 1030, en Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, su papá, Graf Esico von Ballenstedt, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Mathilde von Schwaben von Ober-Lothringen, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Adelaide von Weimar aproximadamente 1072. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1083, en Westdorf, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Ballenstedt, Quedlinburg, Sachsen-Anhalt, Alemania.
